title: Struggling to figure this out- Every Sunday move this entire board to this board.  Not create new boards- just move
excerpt:

posts.author: LynneCP (Lynne Bateson)
posts.cookedHtml:
So I can click Every time period to get Sundays every week, but I cannot get where I am selecting the Next week board items and move to the This week Board items.

It seems that I can only create a new board, and how do I make it board specific. Ideas please. Thanks in advance

posts.author: LynneCP (Lynne Bateson)
posts.cookedHtml: Also realize I am using the incorrect terms. I should be saying group, not board. all the items are in the same board.

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
